title: Monday.com Answers: How to export a board with attachments
excerpt:

posts.author: Kayla-monday.com (Kayla Kaplan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone! Many of you have been asking about how to export your boards along with attachments. So what happens to your files and attachments when you export a board to Excel?

When you export a board to Excel, the Excel file created does not include files and attachments from your board. In order to download the files on your board, open up one file per group on your board and click “Download all” as shown below:

https://lh6.googleusercontent.com/bLjAVyR-nHI5zzlN2EPnz2exQzncLaawqVtuOVwiG26BuL5f6ciwl1pDa8t9y6AM-yGx37G-P5O169jWGCZ7QSKRkxr5530egTdXQKPYZacgyWgoVpCvChLKN7M61RNcvVjo0iJ-(image larger than 4 MB)

Hi, is there any way now to export an board? We are planning on using monday.com on a project with close to 200 seperate jobs, and we will document each job with 4-10 pictures. At the end the costumer wants a report that show the pictures connected to each job… And downloading and doing this manually wont work and removes monday.com as an option…
